# ArchiGen AI

> An editorial publication for architects, archviz artists, and design-forward studios figuring out where AI fits into the drawing set. We test, compare, and publish what's useful. No sponsored placements.

ArchiGen AI is published by Vista Studios. Every tool and workflow we write about has been tested on real architectural projects.

## Core essays

- [What does AI build when architects are in charge?](https://archigenai.com/architects-in-charge.html): A field essay on what AI actually produces when architects direct the tools rather than follow them. On human authorship in the age of generative design.
- [Best AI Tools for Architectural Visualization 2026](https://archigenai.com/best-ai-tools-architectural-visualization-2026.html): Tested comparisons of Midjourney, Chaos Veras, Stable Diffusion, and others for real architectural workflows.
- [Honest Guide to AI Rendering](https://archigenai.com/honest-guide-ai-rendering.html): A candid breakdown of what AI rendering can and can't do for architecture practices today.
- [Prompt Engineering for Architectural Exteriors](https://archigenai.com/prompt-engineering-architectural-exteriors.html): Practical techniques for getting AI to produce credible exterior renders.

## Sections

- [Journal](https://archigenai.com/journal.html): All articles and field notes.
- [Workflows](https://archigenai.com/workflows.html): Step-by-step AI workflows for architectural practice.
- [Tools Directory](https://archigenai.com/tools.html): Curated index of AI tools tested for architecture.

## About

- [Homepage](https://archigenai.com/): Latest issue and featured content.
- [About](https://archigenai.com/about.html): About the publication.

## Optional

- Contact: Available through the website.
